name: reservation-service
purpose: Creates, amends, and cancels reservations. Owns the reservation state machine (held → confirmed → booked → cancelled) and emits reservation events downstream.

name: gds-gateway
purpose: Translates between the OTA's internal booking domain and GDS-specific protocols (Amadeus EDIFACT, Sabre SOAP). Shields upstream services from GDS idiosyncrasies and handles retry/degradation on GDS outages.
